name: com.indiegabo.handy-tools
description: A modular Unity package with a small kernel and opt-in gameplay, editor, and workflow modules for cutscenes, FSM, command patterns, conversations, and scene metadata.

samples.description: A scene-authored cutscene sample that exercises the base non-dialogue workflow.
A scene-authored cutscene sample that exercises the optional Dialogue System workflow.
A scene-authored cutscene sample that pauses for two authored Conversations references and resumes after completion or cancelation.
Character Controller Pro sample scene and authored state assets for the HandyTools FSM module. Requires Character Controller Pro.
Scene-authored command execution, scheduling, undo/redo, and runtime request monitoring sample.
Pre-authored Conversations sample scene with graph authoring workflow and in-scene runtime presenter playback.
Pre-authored HandyScene sample with generic scene metadata sections rendered directly on the scene asset inspector.
